sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method applied to multi-component portfolio. Position size = (Account Equity × Component Weighting) / Current Price Per Share. Component weighting derived from optimal f values and expected returns/variances. Adjusted f = Optimal f / Component Weighting.

source_rule_text: Allocate capital to each portfolio component by multiplying account equity by the component's optimal weighting percentage, then divide by current price per share to determine number of shares to purchase.
